comment: Function name is overly verbose and does not follow PEP 8 naming conventions.
Multiple slots connected to the same signal will execute in reverse order of connection; the first setText call is redundant.
suggestion: btn1.clicked.connect(lambda: lbl.setText("真的按了第一個按鈕"))
original:
btn1.clicked.connect(lambda: lbl.setText("你按了第一個按鈕"))
    btn1.clicked.connect(lambda: lbl.setText("真的按了第一個按鈕"))

comment: Nested function definitions inside a setup function create unnecessary overhead and reduce readability.
